concerns.analysis: The conversion is significantly incomplete. The output JSON contains an explicit marker indicating that 22 sections were omitted due to token budget. As a result, pages 5 through 30, which contain the Table of Contents, Section I (Purpose), Section II (Accomplishments), and Section III (Action Plan), are entirely missing. Furthermore, the listing of Council members in Appendix A continues on pages 32-34 of the source, but only page 31 is included in the output. This represents a critical failure
